content:
Artist:Sammie
Title:I Like It
Submitted by:Cole Bennett

The Whole Song Is Mainly Chords: D, A, Em, G

[ch]D[/ch]        xx0232
[ch]A[/ch]        x02220
[ch]Em[/ch]       022000
[ch]G[/ch]        320001


Example:


[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you look at me.      I like the time we spend baby.[/tab]


[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
  I like what we have grown to be.    I like it girl.   dont you know i like it.[/tab]


Thats about it through out the song if you have any suggestions plz e-mail
me at cole_daddy777@hotmail.com  and visit my website at www.angelfire.com/myband/coledaddy!!!
thanx.
